items.title: [正面] This game is truly incredible. With almost 500 hou...
items.summary:
This game is truly incredible. With almost 500 hours of playtime, I can confidently say that if it weren't worth it, I would have dropped it a long time ago.

If you’re looking for a challenging gacha game that actually tests your skills, I highly recommend giving this hidden gem a try. The gameplay loop is addictive, and the difficulty feels rewarding rather than unfair.

On top of that, the OST is absolutely godlike. It perfectly complements the gameplay, making every encounter feel epic. Don’t sleep on this one!
